---
title: "uavRmp - Adapt Your Planning"
id: material-fw-8
order: 91
summary: "The uavRmp package is designed for UAV autonomous mission planning for monitoring flights of low cost drones based on R."
modules:
  - module-fieldwork
Goals:
  - module-goals-fw
activities:
  - activity-fw-11
assessments:
  - fw-assessment
labels:
  - advanced
  - mandatory
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/UAVFieldwork/material-fw-8.md"
---

The `uavRmp` package supports autonomous UAV mission planning for monitoring flights of low-cost drones based on R.

Read the package documentation:

<https://gisma.github.io/uavRmp/>

## Connected Module

- [Autonomous Flights Made Easy](../modules/module-fieldwork.qmd)
